title: sarcathria indica
intro: Sarcathria indica is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the mountain tea or mountain azalea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sarcathria indica include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in capsules or tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
